content: Let's live a life in two hours.
The "pessimist" prefers to remember that yesterday's skies were clouded instead of hoping that tomorrow's skies will be sunny

1:10:331 hour, 10 minutes, 33 seconds Please! Just do it the way I wrote it! Listen to me...
1:10:421 hour, 10 minutes, 42 seconds We are not here to have fun. Fine... Don't say my name at the end, then.
1:10:501 hour, 10 minutes, 50 seconds Just don't say it's my script! Why not? Let's go with that. You don't get it.
1:11:021 hour, 11 minutes, 02 seconds Do you really think we're satisfied with just a name in the credits? It isn't just you.
1:11:121 hour, 11 minutes, 12 seconds Sometimes I'd like my name taken off too. But I don't, because I have a responsibility.
1:11:201 hour, 11 minutes, 20 seconds Bad as the show may be, I made it. I can't escape that.
1:11:291 hour, 11 minutes, 29 seconds It isn't about being satisfied. You compromise over and over till it doesn't matter anymore.
1:11:421 hour, 11 minutes, 42 seconds But you know, there's still one thing we all believe... Someday we will do something we're satisfied with.
1:11:521 hour, 11 minutes, 52 seconds Something to please everyone who makes it and hears it.
1:12:001 hour, 12 minutes, 01 seconds Only trouble is, this is not that show. That's just how it is!
1:12:111 hour, 12 minutes, 11 seconds I'm sorry, but your name stays. This is your script. No doubt about it.
